assumption_ledger.note: The request does not say whether a one-day delay for approvals is acceptable.
The isolated mirror or broader replay redesign schedule is not pinned down in the current evidence.

mitigations: least privilege scope only to the vendor sandbox
rollback to the sanitized fallback if approval or controls are missing
primary_risk.statement: Choosing the pre-freeze exception path would violate the current stability objective even though it was the right answer earlier.

ranking.summary: Choose the sanitized fallback because the demo freeze explicitly suspends new vendor replay exceptions in favor of stability.
Outright denial is compliant but less helpful than the freeze-compatible sanitized fallback.
The sandbox exception was the pre-freeze answer, but it no longer fits the current no-new-exceptions objective.
The abandoned patch ignores both freeze context and maintainability risk.
Direct override remains the clearest policy miss and fights the explicit freeze objective.
